nasb.text: Now it came about that when Sanballat heard that we were rebuilding the wall, he became furious and very angry and mocked the Jews.

esv.text: Now when Sanballat heard that we were building the wall, he was angry and greatly enraged, and he jeered at the Jews.

cnv.text: 當參巴拉聽見我們正在重建城牆，就很忿怒，非常惱恨，並且譏諷猶大人。

ccb.text: 参巴拉听说我们正在重建城墙，非常愤怒，就嘲笑犹太人，
